metadata.title: Bloombox - Flower Gift EC
metadata.description: Bloombox is a sustainable flower gift platform that connects flower producers with consumers.

hero.title: Deliver Special Feelings with Flowers
hero.subtitle: Sustainable flower gifts that connect producers' passion with your heartfelt message

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.headline: Giving flowers destined for disposal a role of gratitude.
mission.description: In Japan, approximately 1 billion fresh flowers are discarded each year. Bloombox transforms 'buying flowers' into 'rescuing flowers.' We achieve both solving social issues and providing the finest gift experience.

story.title: Flower Story
story.description: Three stories about flower producers, varieties, and delivery journey bring value to every flower.

miles.title: Flower Miles
miles.description: Earn miles with every purchase and redeem them for special rewards.

impact.title: Flower Impact
impact.description: Your purchase contributes to the development of sustainable flower industry.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.terms: By placing your order, you agree to our Terms of Service.

auth.name: Name
auth.password_requirements: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers

mission.title: The Mission
mission.heading: Giving flowers destined for disposal a role of gratitude.
mission.text1: In Japan, approximately 1 billion fresh flowers are discarded each year while still beautiful. Non-standard sizes, supply-demand mismatches, end of events. The reasons vary, but there's nothing wrong with the beauty of the flowers themselves.
mission.text2: Bloombox addresses this 'flower loss' problem. We purchase flowers destined for disposal at fair prices and have professional designers transform them into refined gifts. We achieve both solving social issues and providing the finest gift experience.

founder.title: The Founder's Story
founder.heading: Rescuing flowers, bringing the joy of gifting into everyday life.
founder.text1: Our founder Hiro was born into a family running a flower wholesale business for generations in Toyama Prefecture (Japan's largest tulip producer). From childhood, he watched countless flowers being discarded without reaching the market, no matter how beautifully they bloomed.
founder.text2: During his six years in the Netherlands, he witnessed a 'culture of giving flowers in daily life.' People buying flowers not just for special occasions, but for gratitude and encouragement. This experience connected Japan's rich production background with the loss problem and the 'barrier to giving flowers.'
founder.text3: Not 'buying flowers' but 'rescuing flowers.' And 'giving them to someone special.' Bloombox proposes this new way of loving flowers.

items.1: Every flower comes with a story of the farmer and how it was rescued from disposal.
items.2: A simple, refined gender-neutral UX that even men can choose from without hesitation.
items.3: After enjoying as fresh flowers, transform into dried flowers. We propose ways to enjoy the passage of time.

metadata.title: Concept | Bloombox
metadata.description: Giving flowers destined for disposal a role of gratitude. Discover the vision and mission of Bloombox.

hero.label: Our Vision
hero.mission:
Giving flowers destined for disposal
a role of gratitude.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.headline: 1 billion flowers are discarded each year while still beautiful

stat3.label: Average waste rate at flower shops

problem.description: Non-standard sizes, supply-demand mismatches, end of events — the reasons vary, but there's nothing wrong with the beauty of the flowers themselves. In the hands of professional designers, non-standard flowers become uniquely beautiful arrangements.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.headline: From 'buying flowers' to 'rescuing flowers'

after.label: Bloombox
after.text: Rescue flowers → Connect with people → Contribute to society → Emotional experience

solution.quote: We provide an experience of rescuing flowers, not buying them

stories.label: Flower Story System
stories.headline: Every flower comes with three stories

flower.title: ① The Flower's Story
flower.description: We visualize how your purchased flowers were rescued. We share the number of flowers rescued, time until disposal, variety, flower meaning, and origin.
flower.example: "You rescued 12 flowers. These flowers were scheduled for disposal in 48 hours."

people.title: ② The People's Story
people.description: By showing the faces of farmers and florists involved with the flowers, we enhance empathy and value. We deliver the producers' passion directly to you.
people.example: "Hanako Tanaka, Tulip Farmer, Tonami City, Toyama: Even non-standard flowers are incredibly beautiful"

journey.title: ③ The Journey's Story
journey.description: We display the flower's journey from farm to your hands in timeline format. Each bouquet is assigned a unique batch ID.

psychology.label: Experience Design
psychology.headline: Experience design based on behavioral economics

effect1.title: Identifiable Victim Effect
effect1.description: People feel stronger empathy for specific cases like "these flowers were scheduled for disposal in 48 hours" rather than statistics like "1 billion flowers discarded annually."

effect2.title: IKEA Effect
effect2.description: People value things they've contributed to more highly. By transforming the purchase from "buying flowers" to "rescuing flowers," we create active participation.

effect3.title: Endowment Effect
effect3.description: By adding the Flower Story (stories of flowers and farmers), even physically identical flowers gain significantly higher psychological value.

impact.label: Flower Impact
impact.headline: Your purchase changes society
impact.description: Every time you purchase flowers from Bloombox, your social contribution is visualized numerically. Both sender and recipient can feel the small social contribution of rescuing flowers.

vision.headline: Rescuing flowers, bringing gifting joy to everyday life
vision.description: Not 'buying flowers' but 'rescuing flowers.' And giving them to someone special. Bloombox proposes this new way of loving flowers. Achieving both solving social issues and providing the finest gift experience — that is our vision.
